violations.description: Time as a public health control. — --Food was not marked or identified with the time within which it must be cooked, served, or discarded. -Timers were not set at hot hold make line with multiple items under 140F.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Latches at steamers are not working well both latch/release poorly (top one is missing a screw).

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Grease residue at chip drawer edges and edge of scoop holder. -Cook line equipment has grease residue/build up. -Limescale at front surfaces of steamers. -Heavy dust/debris at walk in cooler fans.
Laundered, proper handling, and storage (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
